# Grand Polo Club & Resort — AI Summary

## Overview
Grand Polo Club & Resort is Emaar Properties' flagship equestrian-themed masterplan community in Dubai. Spanning 5.54 million square metres, it features 3 championship polo fields, a luxury clubhouse, private stables, and 6,661 residences across 22 clusters.

## Developer
Emaar Properties PJSC — developer of Burj Khalifa, Dubai Mall, Dubai Marina, Arabian Ranches.

## Location
Near Al Maktoum International Airport, Dubai, UAE
- 5 minutes to Al Maktoum International Airport
- 10 minutes to Expo City
- 30 minutes to Downtown Dubai

## Properties (First Phase)

### Chevalia Estate
- 5-bedroom luxury villas
- 80 units
- Average BUA: 6,516 sqft
- Average Plot: 7,490 sqft
- Starting Price: AED 9 Million
- Status: Off-Plan
- Handover: Q4 2028

### Chevalia Estate 2
- 4 & 5-bedroom luxury villas
- 120 units
- Unit Types:
  - 4 Bed Luxury: 74 units, 4,168 sqft BUA, from AED 7.88M
  - 5 Bed Ultra Luxury: 24 units, 5,046 sqft BUA, from AED 10.03M
  - 5 Bed Equestrian Luxury: 22 units, 8,635 sqft BUA, from AED 17.61M
- Status: Off-Plan
- Handover: Q2 2029

### Chevalia Fields
- 4 & 5-bedroom luxury villas
- 179 units
- Unit Types:
  - 4 Bedroom: 72 units, 4,166 sqft BUA, from AED 7.34M
  - 5 Bedroom: 107 units, 5,873 sqft BUA, from AED 9.19M
- Status: Off-Plan
- Handover: Q1 2029

## Future Clusters (Launching Soon)
Equestra, Equitera, Equitera 2, Montura, Montura 2, Montura 3, Selvara 1-4

## Payment Plans
All clusters: 10% down payment on booking, 10% instalments at construction milestones, 20% on completion.

## Masterplan Stats
- Total Area: 5.54 million SqM
- Open Space: 1.59 million SqM
- Polo Fields & Stables: 340,000 SqM
- Clubhouse GFA: 5,600 SqM
- Mixed Use GFA: 1.56 million SqM
- Residential Clusters: 22
- Total Residences: 6,661
- Estimated Population: 26,965

## Amenities (23)
Polo Fields, Clubhouse, Stables, Community Centres, Galloping Fountain, Art Pavilion, Open Lawn, Football Courts, MUGA Court, Basketball, Padel Courts, Volleyball, Mini Golf, Playground, Fitness, Dog Park, Forest Walk, Picnic Area, Floral Garden, Mounded Garden, Resting Areas, Pump Track, Mosque

## Golden Visa
All properties qualify for the UAE 10-Year Golden Visa (minimum AED 2M investment).

## Contact
- Phone: +971 4 123 4567
- WhatsApp: +971 4 123 4567
- Email: info@thegrandpolo.com
- Website: https://thegrandpolo.com
- Related: https://oasisemaar.com (The Oasis by Emaar)

## Key Differentiators
- Only equestrian-themed masterplan in the Middle East
- 3 championship polo fields
- Spiraling stables designed as global landmark
- Low entry price (AED 7.34M) for Emaar luxury villa
- Proximity to Al Maktoum Airport ($35B expansion)
- 10% down payment with milestone instalments
